name: Word Search 2025
description: «Word Search: Puzzle Game» is designed for fans of word puzzles. Letters are placed on the board, and your goal is to form words from them. Fill the grid, unlock new levels, complete tasks, and increase your rating. Compete with players from around the world for the title of the most attentive and knowledgeable.
instructions: With mouse click and hold the left button drag over the letters to select a word release to confirm On touch device tap and hold drag over the letters lift your finger to confirm
